auth.login.layout_description: Enter your email and password to sign in
auth.register.layout_description: Fill in the details below to create your account
auth.register.name: Name
auth.forgot_password.layout_description: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password
auth.verify_email.layout_description: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
auth.verify_email.link_sent_message: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
auth.confirm_password.layout_description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
auth.two_factor_challenge.recovery.layou: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.
auth.two_factor_challenge.recovery.toggl: log in with an authentication code
auth.two_factor_challenge.otp.layout_des: Enter the authentication code generated by your authenticator app.
auth.two_factor_challenge.otp.toggle: log in with a recovery code
auth.email_banner.title: Verify your email to use groups
auth.email_banner.description: You need to confirm your email address before you can create a group or join one.
auth.email_banner.link_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
auth.delete_account.heading_description: Delete your account and all of its resources
auth.delete_account.warning_body: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
auth.delete_account.dialog_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
auth.delete_account.dialog_description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
auth.two_factor.modal.enabled_descriptio: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
auth.two_factor.modal.verify_description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
auth.two_factor.modal.enable_description: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app
auth.two_factor.recovery_codes.title: 2FA recovery codes
auth.two_factor.recovery_codes.descripti: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
auth.two_factor.recovery_codes.warning_p: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click
